title: Recognise diseases and conditions during inspection of food animal
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Recognise diseases and conditions during inspection of food animal demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify the nature, signs and causes of common abnormalities and diseases in food animals

pcs.text: Identify the nature and causes of physical abnormalities in food animal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the nature and causes of physical abnormalities in food animal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the nature and causes of physical abnormalities in food animal.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the ways in which food animals can be poisoned, and the signs of poisoning.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify key characteristics of common microbiological diseases found in food animals.

elements.title: Apply knowledge of animal diseases and conditions to the interpretation of ante and post-mortem procedures
